evals.prompt: Create a learning artifact from this YouTube tutorial: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ — I want to understand what it covers and get a runnable implementation if applicable. Save the artifact package to the standard artifacts directory.
evals.expected_output: A complete artifact package under UA_ARTIFACTS_DIR/youtube-tutorial-creation/{date}/{slug}__HHMMSS/ containing manifest.json, README.md, CONCEPT.md, IMPLEMENTATION.md, and implementation/ directory. The CONCEPT.md should be readable without watching the video.
expectations: The youtube-transcript-metadata skill script is invoked (uv run .claude/skills/youtube-transcript-metadata/scripts/fetch_youtube_transcript_metadata.py)
The artifacts root is resolved using `resolve_artifacts_dir()` before writing any outputs
A run directory is created under the resolved artifacts root following the YYYY-MM-DD/slug__HHMMSS convention
manifest.json is created and contains a valid status field (full, degraded_transcript_only, or failed)
CONCEPT.md is created and is non-empty
IMPLEMENTATION.md is created and is non-empty
No outputs are written directly to CURRENT_SESSION_WORKSPACE/artifacts/ as the durable artifact location

evals.prompt: I want to learn from this video but only need the concept writeup, not runnable code: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ — create a concept-only artifact.
evals.expected_output: A concept-only artifact package. manifest.json shows learning_mode=concept_only. CONCEPT.md is produced. implementation/ directory may be minimal or absent.
expectations: The youtube-transcript-metadata skill script is invoked for ingestion
README.md exists and references the video URL and title
manifest.json exists with a valid status field

evals.prompt: Create a tutorial artifact from this YouTube video, but it fails to extract the transcript. Handle the degraded case gracefully: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=INVALID_ID_OR_BLOCKED — still produce a manifest and README explaining what happened.
evals.expected_output: Even with transcript failure, the agent produces manifest.json (status=failed or degraded), README.md with the error context, and does NOT crash without leaving any artifacts. The manifest documents the failure_class.
expectations: The youtube-transcript-metadata skill script is invoked
manifest.json is created even when transcript extraction fails
manifest.json contains an extraction.transcript field that is not 'attempted_succeeded'
README.md is created (even if minimal) explaining the failure
The agent does not write durable outputs under CURRENT_SESSION_WORKSPACE only
